# Realpha Blog

Realpha Blog is a bilingual public lab for technical and investment research: hypotheses, validation plans, negative results, methodology notes, and agent-readable Markdown are published so humans and AI systems can inspect, cite, and challenge the work.

## Key Pages

- Home: https://blog.getrealpha.com/
- English Home: https://blog.getrealpha.com/en/
- Methodology: https://blog.getrealpha.com/methodology/
- English Methodology: https://blog.getrealpha.com/en/methodology/
- About: https://blog.getrealpha.com/about/
- English About: https://blog.getrealpha.com/en/about/
- Lab Index: https://blog.getrealpha.com/lab/
- English Lab Index: https://blog.getrealpha.com/en/lab/
- RSS: https://blog.getrealpha.com/rss.xml
- English RSS: https://blog.getrealpha.com/en/rss.xml
- Full Text: https://blog.getrealpha.com/llms-full.txt

## Existing Posts

- 不合理的人與冪次法則——三題小考，考出我投資直覺裡的裂縫: https://blog.getrealpha.com/blog/power-law-unreasonable-people/ (Markdown: https://blog.getrealpha.com/blog/power-law-unreasonable-people.md; English: https://blog.getrealpha.com/en/blog/power-law-unreasonable-people/; English Markdown: https://blog.getrealpha.com/en/blog/power-law-unreasonable-people.md)

- 為什麼我們給每個預測寫死到期日: https://blog.getrealpha.com/blog/expiry-date-for-every-prediction/ (Markdown: https://blog.getrealpha.com/blog/expiry-date-for-every-prediction.md; English: https://blog.getrealpha.com/en/blog/expiry-date-for-every-prediction/; English Markdown: https://blog.getrealpha.com/en/blog/expiry-date-for-every-prediction.md)
- 把 Podcast 和 YouTube 變成可搜尋的研究資料庫: https://blog.getrealpha.com/blog/podcast-youtube-searchable-archive/ (Markdown: https://blog.getrealpha.com/blog/podcast-youtube-searchable-archive.md; English: https://blog.getrealpha.com/en/blog/podcast-youtube-searchable-archive/; English Markdown: https://blog.getrealpha.com/en/blog/podcast-youtube-searchable-archive.md)
